confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_faf487ee-2d1a-4bec-8d36-b6550dbd352d read back as archived

evidence: Envelope env_1e6d265d-77bb-4c0f-a557-1e7fe0690644 was submitted with --target-locus narada-andrey.Bob.
narada task workboard --view compact --format json source_envelopes entry displayed target: null.
proposed_direction: Persist target_locus into the portable envelope or a canonical routing field consumed by workboard.
Make compact workboard show directed message target without requiring debug output.
Add regression coverage for target_locus visibility in source_envelopes.
payload.summary: After OSM delivery to Bob failed, Kevin submitted a local inbox observation with --target-locus narada-andrey.Bob. The submit response recorded routing.target_locus, but task workboard compact source_envelopes displayed target: null. This weakens handoff observability for directed agent messages.
payload.title: Workboard should surface inbox envelope target_locus when present

promotion.note: Envelope archived; no target-zone mutation was performed.
